title: AI-Prompt Library for Non-Tech Founders
target_user: Small business owners using AI tools
problem_or_desire: Inability to write effective prompts to get high-quality business outputs
core_concept: A searchable database of verified, industry-specific prompt templates
proposed_approach: Categorized prompt templates that users can copy-paste into their existing AI tools
prototype_scope: A Notion-based database shared via a paywall landing page

title: Micro-batch Kitchens for Allergens
problem_or_desire: Anxiety around cross-contamination in communal food spaces
core_concept: A transparent preparation window enabled through recorded 24-hour visual feed accessibility
proposed_approach: Operating exclusively single-allergy micro kitchens, providing authenticated 'visual documentation' of all food assembly phases
prototype_scope: Testing pre-ordering on three specialized nutrient packs prepared under restricted 24/7 web camera documentation for five trial users

title: Institutional Compost Loyalty Loop
problem_or_desire: High workplace organic waste volume with no benefit or impact reflection
core_concept: Closing the loop on office grounds by returning enriched garden soil equivalents back to common spaces
proposed_approach: Pickup service providing reusable metal receptacles for spent coffee pucks; providing professional composting services and quarterly soil analytics
prototype_scope: Ten offices sharing a municipal processing pipeline with branded bucket exchange infrastructure

title: Inter-App Knowledge Scavenger
problem_or_desire: Duplicate information creation where project context is scattered between messenger apps and whiteboard collaboration tools.
core_concept: Bi-directional linkage building between synchronous communications and asynchronous document stores through contextual tagging.
proposed_approach: Running as an background process, the agent creates summary snippets of messenger discussions, placing them into current projects in management folders.
prototype_scope: Connecting one real-time chat platform specifically to one project management ticketing system.

title: Syntax Storm
target_user: Developers working on clean code focus
problem_or_desire: High mental fatigue during weekend learning periods
core_concept: Combat strategy built entirely on cleaning buggy snippets, represented as infected territory grids.
proposed_approach: Applying real regex principles as combat commands, effectively treating syntax repair as real-time defensive fortification building.
prototype_scope: One combat grid that rewards valid syntax string repair of two predefined erroneous input segments.

title: Remote Heritage Immersion Kitchen
target_user: Expats seeking nostalgia and traditional cooking comfort
problem_or_desire: Failure of traditional catering to capture regional specific 'feel' of comfort home-cooking
core_concept: Crowdsourced historical cook books localized into professional recipe standards by diaspora community cooks
proposed_approach: Pairing a certified older migrant cook to coach the home visitor remotely over real-time guidance tools as the customer actually prepares their own specialized regional dish
prototype_scope: Test sessions where five experts use standardized remote interface pads to walk households through four heritage dumpling recipes

title: Micro-SaaS Acquisition Brokerage
target_user: Developers looking to sell small, profitable web tools
problem_or_desire: Lack of a transparent marketplace for selling software projects earning under $500/month
core_concept: A specialized brokerage service for very small digital assets
proposed_approach: Standardized due diligence reports and escrow services for micro-transactions
prototype_scope: A curated email newsletter featuring one project for sale per week

title: VendorOrbit
problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in ingredient pricing across multiple wholesalers
core_concept: Aggregated daily procurement ledger with alert system
proposed_approach: Manual import of vendor PDFs converted to a unified dashboard showing cost fluctuations
prototype_scope: A tool that parses CSV or PDF invoices and displays a simplified price comparison table for flour, sugar, and dairy

title: High-Efficiency Batch Prep Lockers
target_user: Early-career shift workers in transit corridors
problem_or_desire: No time to properly nutritious pre-prepped daily sustenance between rigid shift boundaries
core_concept: Convenient pickup of pre-prepped meals for shift workers.
proposed_approach: A scheduled pickup service for pre-prepped meals at transit hubs.
prototype_scope: Coordinate 3 pickup points at a transit hub where users collect pre-ordered meals from a staff member. | Partner with a local kitchen; Recruit 10 shift workers; Execute 3 days of pickups; Gather feedback on convenience

title: Synchronized Stride
problem_or_desire: Maintaining social connection through shared physical activity
core_concept: A cooperative platformer where two players must walk at the same pace to keep their characters moving
proposed_approach: Use accelerometer data to sync movement speed between two remote devices
prototype_scope: A simple 2D platformer level where character movement is locked until both devices detect matching step cadences
